Sector Momentum Indicators Used
Relative Strength vs SPY — Sector ETF price vs S&P 500 over 20-day rolling window. >1.0 = outperforming.
Sector RSI (14) — Momentum oscillator on the sector ETF. 30-70 is neutral range.
Money Flow Index — Volume-weighted RSI. Tracks institutional capital rotation into/out of sectors.
Breadth (% > 20d EMA) — % of stocks in sector above their 20-day EMA. >60% = broad strength.

The Momentum Score Formula
Momentum Score =
Technical Score × 0.40
+ Sentiment Score × 0.25
+ Sector Momentum × 0.20
+ Market Regime × 0.15
Each sub-score normalized 0-100. ≥75 = Strong Buy. 50-74 = Watch. <50 = Avoid.
